violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed employee(s) not washing hands before putting on gloves.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment as not cleaned properly. Observed fan on wall, by hand sink, that has loose hanging debris on it.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed reach in freezer in kitchen area needs to be cleaned more often
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. Tested dishmachine twice at 0 ppm chlorine

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Observed ceiling not smooth and easily cleanable at time of inspection. Also had loose hanging debris and discoloration on it.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Observed ceiling in food prep area is textured sheet rock, which is neither smooth, nor cleanable.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed cracked floor tiles in food prep area.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
